---
name: Remove Email Files
about: Give a request to remove email files, if you think these emails belong to you or your company.

---

**If you found email releated to you or your company and you don't want to show them publicly, Please add name of those email files you want to remove**
e.g, just change the filename placeholder
- https://github.com/rix4uni/email-inventory/blob/main/Emails/example.com.txt
- https://github.com/rix4uni/email-inventory/blob/main/Emails/domain.com.txt
